data.description: Currently, workflow action prompts fall back to static skills or non-Loom definitions when a Loom prompt is unavailable. This creates maintenance burden and inconsistency. Replace this fallback behavior by shipping the default Knots workflow as a Loom bundle and ensuring claim/poll/skill resolution exclusively use workflow-installed Loom prompt bodies for both built-in and custom workflows. Preserve existing multi-workflow installation and selection behavior. Remove all dead compatibility branches and fallback code once the Loom path is the only authoritative source.
